body:
APPROVE
The result revision implements the requested personas card/detail/bind flow and includes light/dark persona screenshot baselines. I could not rerun Playwright locally because this sandbox rejects binding the preview server to `127.0.0.1:4173`, but the committed execution result reports success and the changed files line up with all four personas e2e cases.
